calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-21-2007 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-15-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: C. Salceda.
Jennifer S. Coleman, Esq. for Plaintiff: California Mortgage and Realty, Inc.
Plaintiff's Witness: Adam Fritz, present, was sworn and direct examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the 11 Defaulted Defendants.
Judgment granted and singed in open court, see scanned doc. for details of Judgment.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Interim Payment Of Receiver
Off Calendar Dec-04-2006 Off Calendar

Order To Show Cause Re: Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction In Aid Of Receiver; Temporary Restraining Order Pending Hearing On Order To Show Cause
Off Calendar Oct-12-2006 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Robert B. Kaplan of Jeffer Mangels Butler & Marmaro, LLP, 398-8080, appearing for plaintiffs and moving parties

No other appearances on this matter. Mr. Kaplan presented a valid proof of service to the Court and Plaintiff's ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IN AID OF RECEIVER is granted. Order will issue, and was signed in open Court. (301/PJB) Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR 8189
